text.title: test-tdd-red-green-split-agents Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for test-tdd-red-green-split-agents as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: RED skill includes `Edit` "just in case it needs to fix a typo in an existing test."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: That escape hatch reopens the cheating path; a typo fix belongs in a separate refactor cycle, not inside a RED turn.

failure-mode.description: Orchestrator passes the original acceptance criterion to GREEN "for context."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: GREEN should derive intent from the failing test alone; reintroducing the AC lets the model satisfy the AC text without making the test pass.
